title: Example workspace — config-only reference
_comment: A workspace is a goal bound to a repo worktree plus the team of specialists the orchestrator will spawn. This file is a lightweight, human-readable record of that binding — it is NOT read by any engine (there is no launcher). To run: install the agent pack into the worktree (bin/jumpcode-install --project <worktree>), start Claude Code there as the orchestrator, point it at roles/orchestrator.md, and hand it the goal. 'team' names which .claude/agents specialists this goal expects; the orchestrator spawns them as needed. 'tracker' defaults to GitHub Issues (ADR 0006).
